title: Build Store page with product grid, category filters, and search
completion_summary: Store page with product grid, filters, search, and detail modal integration created
acceptance_criteria: /store route renders a responsive product grid (1 col mobile, 2 md, 3 lg, 4 xl).
Category filter buttons and search input update displayed products.
ProductCard displays image placeholder, name, category, price, and Add to Cart button.
Add to Cart button dispatches cart action and shows feedback (e.g. toast or badge update).
Empty state is shown when search/filter yields no results.
Page uses semantic main/section markup and is keyboard navigable.
